title: branch — validation rules
description: Eight custom Laravel validation rules published by BranchServiceProvider::boot() so any FormRequest / Data class can validate branch-shaped fields. Some are shared with sibling modules (valid_e164_phone, valid_url, valid_hex_color); the branch-specific ones (valid_opening_hours, valid_address_structure, valid_coordinates, branch_*_same_tenant) are the payoff for using a structured JSONB blob.

rules.name: valid_e164_phone
rules.description: Same shape as `user::valid_e164_phone` — ensures the value is a valid E.164 international phone number. Aliased here so callers targeting the Branch endpoints don't need to import from the user module. Delegates to `giggsey/libphonenumber-for-php`.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid international phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155552671).

rules.name: valid_url
rules.description: Extends Laravel's built-in `url` rule with a per-scheme allowlist. Default = { 'https' }; loosen to { 'http', 'https' } when the caller passes 'http' explicitly. Refuses `data:` / `javascript:` / `file:` schemes. Length-capped at 500 chars to match the DB column.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid URL using one of the allowed schemes (:schemes).

rules.name: valid_hex_color
rules.description: Ensures the value is a 3-digit or 6-digit hex color prefixed with `#`. Used for branding-adjacent fields (though the Branch model itself doesn't ship one in Wave 2 — reserved for future `Branch.brand_color` when the branding module lands).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a hex color in the form #RGB or #RRGGBB.

rules.name: valid_opening_hours
rules.description: Structural + semantic validation of the opening_hours JSONB blob. Rejects when: (a) any of the 7 day keys (monday..sunday) is missing OR is not an array; (b) any period is missing `open` or `close`; (c) any time is not HH:MM format; (d) any period has `close <= open` (support-agent flag: the observer normalises 24:00 → next day at 00:00 explicitly; passing an actual 24:00 in HH:MM is refused); (e) any exception is missing `date` or has an invalid ISO-8601 date; (f) multi-period days are present when the tenant lacks `branch_multi_period_hours` entitlement (checked lazily against the resolved tenant on the request, not at rule registration).
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid opening_hours structure: :error_detail.

rules.name: valid_address_structure
rules.description: Ensures the address JSONB has required fields (`line1`, `city`, `country_code`) + optional-but-typed fields (`line2` string, `subdivision` string, `postal_code` string, `formatted` string). Rejects unknown top-level keys. `country_code` is validated as a 2-letter ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 uppercase code. Does NOT validate that the country_code resolves to a live geography::Country row — that soft check runs in the observer against the geography catalogue.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid structured address: :error_detail.

rules.name: valid_coordinates
rules.description: Ensures the coordinates JSONB has `lat` in [-90, 90], `lng` in [-180, 180], `accuracy_m` a positive number (nullable), and `source` in {'manual', 'geocoded', 'imported'} (nullable — null accepted at write time; the observer defaults it to 'manual' when the caller supplies coordinates without source). Also refuses (0, 0) (Null Island) unless the caller explicitly opts in via a `metadata.null_island_allowed=true` flag — (0, 0) is almost always a bug from a client that forgot to include coordinates.

rules.name: branch_organization_same_tenant
rules.description: Cross-field rule. On a create request, resolves `organization_id` from the payload against the caller's active tenant + refuses when `organization.tenant_id !== active_tenant.id`. Belt-and-braces on top of the observer — surfaces a clean form-validation error before the DB write. On update requests, no-ops (organization_id is immutable so the observer refuses regardless).
rules.default_message: The selected :attribute belongs to a different tenant.

rules.name: branch_region_same_tenant
rules.description: Same shape as `branch_organization_same_tenant` for the Region FK.
rules.default_message: The selected :attribute belongs to a different tenant.
